name: rehab/intake-form
title: Intake Form
description: Multi-step admissions intake questionnaire (native rebuild of the legacy Forminator intake form): personal, travel, medical, addiction and billing sections with conditional fields and e-signature. Field structure lives in assets/intake-spec.json.

lead.default: Everything you share here is treated as strictly confidential and is only used by our clinical and admissions team to prepare your stay.
